indicators.name: Large window
indicators.rationale: The large window allows natural light to enter, which can improve mood and productivity.

indicators.name: Marble tiles
indicators.rationale: Marble tiles are visually appealing but may require more maintenance.

indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets provide storage but do not directly support computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space has a large window that allows natural light to enter, which can improve mood and productivity. However, the presence of cabinets and marble tiles does not directly support computer work.
